title: 生活场景：日常开口
method: 学习 -> 测验 -> 跟读 -> 通过后进入下一句
sources: Manual curation; sentence-pattern inspiration checked against Tatoeba-style everyday usage.

units.phrase: Could I get a latte to go?
units.meaningZh: 我可以要一杯拿铁带走吗？
units.exampleEn: Could I get a latte to go? And could you make it less sweet?
units.exampleZh: 我可以要一杯拿铁带走吗？可以少甜一点吗？
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要说 I want latte take away。点单时 could I get 更自然，to go 表示带走。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合点咖啡、买快餐、买饮料时开口。先说你要什么，再补充温度、甜度或带走。

quiz.promptZh: 不看例句，用英文说一句你在咖啡店点单的话。
quiz.sampleAnswer: Could I get a latte to go?

units.phrase: Could you help me with this?
units.meaningZh: 你能帮我处理一下这个吗？
units.exampleEn: Could you help me with this? I am not sure how to use the machine.
units.exampleZh: 你能帮我处理一下这个吗？我不太确定这个机器怎么用。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要直接说 Help me this。with this 是固定结构，语气也需要更礼貌。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合自助机、门禁、快递柜、缴费机等不会操作时求助。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文向别人礼貌求助。
quiz.sampleAnswer: Could you help me with this?

units.phrase: Is this the right way to the station?
units.meaningZh: 这是去车站的正确方向吗？
units.exampleEn: Is this the right way to the station? I think I may be going the wrong way.
units.exampleZh: 这是去车站的正确方向吗？我觉得我可能走错方向了。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要说 this way right station。英文问句要有 Is this the right way to...
units.usageNoteZh: 适合不确定路线时确认方向，比直接问 where is 更具体。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文确认自己是不是走对路。
quiz.sampleAnswer: Is this the right way to the station?

units.phrase: Do you have any time available this afternoon?
units.exampleEn: Do you have any time available this afternoon? I would like to make an appointment.
units.exampleZh: 你今天下午有空档吗？我想预约一下。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要说 You have time today afternoon? available 更适合问正式空档。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合预约理发、看诊、维修、咨询等服务。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文询问今天下午是否有预约空档。
quiz.sampleAnswer: Do you have any time available this afternoon?

units.phrase: Could you say that again more slowly?
units.meaningZh: 你能再慢一点说一遍吗？
units.exampleEn: Could you say that again more slowly? I did not catch the last part.
units.exampleZh: 你能再慢一点说一遍吗？我没听清最后一部分。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要只说 repeat。完整说 could you say that again more slowly 更礼貌也更清楚。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合任何听不清的场景，是学习者必须熟练掌握的救命句。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文请对方慢一点再说一次。
quiz.sampleAnswer: Could you say that again more slowly?

units.exampleEn: Can I pay by card? Or do you only take cash?
units.exampleZh: 我可以刷卡付款吗？还是你们只收现金？
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要说 use card pay。pay by card 是固定说法。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合商店、餐厅、窗口付款时快速确认付款方式。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文问是否可以刷卡。

units.exampleEn: How long is the wait? We can come back later if needed.
units.exampleZh: 需要等多久？如果需要的话我们可以晚点再回来。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要说 need wait how long。How long is the wait? 是很自然的服务场景问法。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合餐厅排队、诊所等待、客服排队、取号等待。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文询问需要等多久。

units.phrase: Let me make sure I understood correctly.
units.meaningZh: 我确认一下我理解得对不对。
units.exampleEn: Let me make sure I understood correctly. The appointment is at three, right?
units.exampleZh: 我确认一下我理解得对不对。预约是三点，对吗？
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要只说 I know right? 这会显得不清楚。make sure I understood correctly 更稳。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合确认时间、地址、价格、规则，能减少误会。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文表达“我确认一下我理解得对不对”。
quiz.sampleAnswer: Let me make sure I understood correctly.
